ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent and DNN module settings. This is not displayed to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

SectionTitle.helper: Required. Main section heading. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.
SectionTitle.placeholder: A Calm Start to This Section

SectionTitleCssClass.helper: Optional. Extra classes applied to the section title.

SectionTitleIcon.helper: Find icons at FontAwesome

SectionIntroText.helper: Required. Introductory content shown below the title. Basic formatting and links are supported.
SectionIntroText.placeholder: Add a short introduction for this section.

SectionTextCssClass.helper: Optional. Extra classes applied to the intro text.

SectionIcon.helper: Optional. Decorative icon shown above or beside the title depending on the display format. Find icons at FontAwesome. (Examples: fas fa-heart, fas fa-leaf, fas fa-tree, etc.)
